reviews.comment:
Lamento haber parado ahí...un desastre...gente mucha y comes lo que ellos quieren

(Translated by Google)
I regret stopping there...a disaster...so many people and you eat what they want you to eat

reviews.comment:
Ojala puedan arreglar las entradas y salidas hacia la Ruta 2 desde la Estación de Servicio ya que están deterioradas.

(Translated by Google)
I hope they can fix the entrances and exits to Route 2 from the Service Station, as they are deteriorating.

One of the best places to charge and relax a bit at the same time

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, baños impecables, el café imperdible para seguir viaje!

(Translated by Google)
Great service, spotless bathrooms, and the coffee is a must-try to fuel up for your next trip!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4bGVtRzFnRRAB

reviewer.displayName: Senior Master Juan Manuel del Valle

reviews.comment:
Pero con los precios se les va la mano, un pequeño sándwich con una feta de jamón tipo tela de cebolla e igual con la feta de queso $1800= una vergüenza... un R O B O

(Translated by Google)
But their prices are outrageous. A small sandwich with a thin slice of ham and a slice of cheese costs $1800—a disgrace... a RIP-OFF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4NGVhQmFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy limpio todo, se come muy bien. Buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Everything is very clean, the food is very good. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4OXBYVGtBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Recibi muy buena atencion al detenerme para comprar combustible. Me brindaron buena atencion al realizar verificaciones en mi vehiculo, igual en el sector de expendio de comidas y bebidas. El lugar de estacionamiento es muy adecuado. Los aseos tienen muy buen control de mantenimiento.

(Translated by Google)
I received excellent service when I stopped to buy fuel. They also provided good service when they checked my vehicle, as well as in the food and beverage area. The parking lot is very convenient. The restrooms are very well maintained.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4aHY3YndnRRAB
